Acton Bridge Rail Count

Daily train movement counts for Acton Bridge [ACB], including freight workings and last updated time.

Loading Acton Bridge movement data...

How this tool works

Acton Bridge Rail Count records train movements after they are reported by Network Rail’s live TRUST train movement feed. A background collector checks for reports linked to Acton Bridge and saves matching movements into the database.

  • Page refreshed means this website has checked the database again.
  • Last train captured means the newest real Network Rail movement saved for the selected date.
  • Live rows are real captured Network Rail TRUST movements.
  • Platform is shown when Network Rail includes it in the movement report. If no platform is supplied, it shows as —.
  • Origin and destination may show as Unknown until the schedule loader matches the working.
  • Duplicate TRUST reports for the same train within a few minutes are combined into one visible movement.
  • Today uses UK time via Europe/London, so it changes date correctly at UK midnight.
  • Next expected services only appears for Today and uses UK time. It shows booked passenger, freight and ECS/other services separately, removes trains once captured by TRUST, and refreshes frequently; it is not a live delay predictor.
